Home › Programmes › Diploma in Medical and Health Science
Diploma Programme

Diploma in
Medical & Health Science

The Diploma in Medical and Health Science (previously known as Diploma in Medical Assistant) is a 3-year programme training medical assistants to address Malaysia's growing healthcare needs. With 6.4% projected annual workforce growth and chronic diseases driving 73% of deaths, graduates are crucial for patient care. The programme offers clinical and administrative training for hospitals, oil & gas, and related industries.

3 Years (Full Time) Intake: May & September
Enrol Now

Accreditation

Code: DMHS MQA: MQA/FA 4551 MOHE: KPT(R2/0913/4/0049) Local / Malaysian Only

Why Choose DIT?

  • ✓ Full scholarship & job placements from partner hospitals
  • ✓ MOHE & MQA accredited programmes
  • ✓ 30+ years affiliated with Damai Service Hospital

Advantages of Studying at DIT

MOHE & MQA Accredited — All programmes approved by Ministry of Higher Education
PTPTN Loans — Financial assistance available for eligible Malaysian students
Hostel Accommodation — Established condominiums with full facilities nearby
Job Placements — Scholarship partnerships with partner hospitals
Qualified Faculty — Registered lecturers and clinical instructors
30+ Years Excellence — Affiliated with Damai Service Hospital

Entry Requirements

Entry Requirements

Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia (SPM) or equivalent with a minimum of FIVE (5) Credits in: (a) Bahasa Melayu / Bahasa Malaysia; (b) ONE (1) Science subject: Biology or Chemistry, OR Physics with a Pass in Biology, OR General Science / Applied Science; (c) Mathematics or Additional Mathematics; (d) TWO (2) credits from any other subjects; AND (e) Pass in English
OR GCE O-Level or equivalent with FIVE (5) Credits: TWO (2) from Science or Mathematics (Biology / Physics / Chemistry / General Science), THREE (3) from any other subjects, AND Pass in English
OR Certificate in a health-related field recognised and approved by the Medical Assistant Board (MAB): SPM or equivalent with minimum THREE (3) credits, OR other qualifications subject to approval by the MAB

About This Programme

The Diploma in Medical and Health Science (previously known as Diploma in Medical Assistant) is a 3-year programme training medical assistants to address Malaysia's growing healthcare needs. With 6.4% projected annual workforce growth and chronic diseases driving 73% of deaths, graduates are crucial for patient care. The programme offers clinical and administrative training for hospitals, oil & gas, and related industries.

Course Modules

1Semester 1

  • Human Structure and Function
  • Health Sociology and Psychology
  • Basic Epidemiology
  • Basic Medical Microbiology and Parasitology
  • Law, Ethics and Professionalism in Healthcare
  • Islamic Studies / Moral Education
  • Professional Practice and Patient Care

2Semester 2

  • Medical Science I
  • Surgical Science I
  • Community Health I
  • Applied Physiology I
  • Professional Skills Development
  • Clinical Examination I
  • Pathology and Therapeutics I

3Semester 3

  • Medical Science II
  • Clinical Examination II
  • Applied Physiology II
  • Advanced Communicative English
  • Pathology and Therapeutics II
  • Clinical Practice I – Medicine and Pediatrics

4Semester 4

  • Surgical Science II
  • Community Health II
  • Community Service
  • Civilization Appreciation and Ethics
  • Clinical Practice II
  • Clinical Practice III

5Semester 5

  • Community Health III
  • Basic Research Methodology and Statistics
  • Clinical Practice IV – Family and Community Health
  • Clinical Practice V – Mental Health

6Semester 6

  • Pre-Hospital Care
  • Emergency Medicine
  • Clinical Practice VI
  • Clinical Practice VII

Career Prospects

Government & Private HospitalsMedical Centres / University HospitalCommunity Healthcare WorkerHome Based Patient CareOil and Gas Industry

Future Education Pathways

→Diploma → Degree in Medical Science
→Degree → Master in Medical Science
